manifest.name: open-food-facts
manifest.author: DreamLayer Team
manifest.description: Look at a shelf, get the better pick. Nutri-Score becomes a rating, allergens get flagged, straight from open data. No account, no key.
manifest.forwho: For anyone with a diet, an allergy, or a habit of squinting at the small print.
long: This is what gives TasteLens something to rank on. Look at a shelf or a menu and it sorts the options by your rules.
Every item scored A to E by Nutri-Score, allergens flagged, pulled live from the Open Food Facts community database. Free, no API key.
Your diet stays on your device. The only thing that leaves is the product name, so it can look the item up.
